description_long: This is a modern electric kettle, primarily cylindrical in shape with a slightly tapered top and a flat base. The body is a matte dark gray, featuring a large, vertical, black water level window on the front, marked with measurement lines for easy viewing. The handle is robust, side-mounted, and ergonomically curved, made of a slightly lighter gray plastic, and includes a red power switch at the bottom. The spout is integrated and angular, designed for precise pouring, while the lid is circular and appears to be hinged, blending seamlessly with the top surface. The base is flat and wide, providing stability, and the overall design is minimalistic with no visible decorative patterns, emphasizing functionality and ease of use.
description: A matte dark gray electric kettle with a side-mounted handle, black water level window, and integrated spout, designed for modern utility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black water level window, Bosch branding, and the ergonomic handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full handle, red power switch at the base, and the absence of the spout or water window.
description_view_2: Angled view similar to the front, showing the water window, handle, and a partial view of the spout.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the spout and the seamless, unadorned rear surface, with the handle mostly hidden.
attribute_lid_design: hinged flat lid, no visible knob
